---
title: "Page 4 - Methods Page Variant"
id: "mod001-se01-sec04-sp04"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec04"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---









## Method

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a clear explanation of what the method, process, or analytical approach is._]

---

## When to use this

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Describe the specific situations or conditions where this method is appropriate._]

---

## Steps

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide a step-by-step breakdown of how to apply the method correctly._]

---

## Example

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide a short illustrative example of the method in use._]

---

## Limitations and considerations

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Detail any key limitations, assumptions, or risks associated with this approach._]

---

## Learning Activities



---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide an overview of the sequence or process the learner is about to follow._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.step-sequence}
<!-- editable:start content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the numbered steps or procedural stages here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or next-step prompt after the sequence._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Set the scene for this timeline or chronological sequence._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.timeline}
**Developmental Timeline**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the staged development or sequence of events here._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or reflection prompt after the timeline._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->



---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide an overview of the sequence or process the learner is about to follow._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.step-sequence}
<!-- editable:start content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the numbered steps or procedural stages here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or next-step prompt after the sequence._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Set the scene for this timeline or chronological sequence._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.timeline}
**Developmental Timeline**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the staged development or sequence of events here._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or reflection prompt after the timeline._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec04-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 3 - Worked Example Variant</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec04-sp05.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 5 - Data Page Variant</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
